case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. NNODIM, DESMOND I.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NNODIM, DESMOND I. $3,957.79 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,040.79
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NNODIM, DESMOND I.
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT HEARING SET FOR MAY-20-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $499.29 AS TO DEFENDANT NNODIM, DESMOND I.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,032.71 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $813.03 INTEREST, $28.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,970.66 AS TO DEFENDANT NNODIM, DESMOND I.
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NNODIM, DESMOND I.

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NNODIM, DESMOND I.

JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
NOTICE OF HEARING AND COUNTER AFFIDAVIT, RETURNED SERVED BY THE LOS ANGELES SHERIFF OFFICE

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, CALENDAR OF MAY-20-1997 GRANTED EXCEPT FOR THE SUM OF $50.00 TO BE WITHHELD FROM EACH PAY PERIOD; LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE 1/2 EARNINGS HELD TO JUDGMENT DEBTOR & 1/2 TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT.
